category_sources: source_facts.description says GitHub command-line tool; official GitHub CLI manual says gh works with GitHub from the command line.
display_name_sources: Official project site and GitHub Docs call the product GitHub CLI; source_facts executable is gh.
docs_sources: Official cli.github.com manual is the dedicated command reference; GitHub Docs provides official GitHub CLI product documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplied as https://github.com/cli/cli; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a GitHub CLI; official GitHub CLI manual lists GitHub workflow commands including repo, issue, pr, workflow, and api.
